    C

    Client - Class in org.tucn.pt.model
     
    Client() - Constructor for class org.tucn.pt.model.Client
     
    Client(int, String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.tucn.pt.model.Client
    Initializez un client nou cu toate detaliile, inclusiv ID-ul (l-am folosit pentru extragerea din DB).
    Client(String, String, String) - Constructor for class org.tucn.pt.model.Client
    Initializez un client nou fara ID (l-am folosit inaintea inserarii in DB).
    ClientBLL - Class in org.tucn.pt.businessLayer
    Gestioneaza logica de business pentru clienti.
    ClientBLL() - Constructor for class org.tucn.pt.businessLayer.ClientBLL
     
    ClientDAO - Class in org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer
     
    ClientDAO() - Constructor for class org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer.ClientDAO
     
    clientName() - Method in record class org.tucn.pt.model.Bill
    Returns the value of the clientName record component.
    close(Connection) - Static method in class org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer.ConnectionFactory
    Inchide un obiect de tip Connection, eliberand resursele.
    close(ResultSet) - Static method in class org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer.ConnectionFactory
    Inchide un ResultSet, eliberand memoria alocata acestuia.
    close(Statement) - Static method in class org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer.ConnectionFactory
    Inchide o interogare de tip Statement, eliberand resursele asociate.
    ConnectionFactory - Class in org.tucn.pt.dataAccessLayer
    Gestioneaza conexiunea la baza de date MySQL
    createOrder(int, int, int) - Method in class org.tucn.pt.businessLayer.ProductOrderBLL
    Valideaza disponibilitatea stocului, creeaza o comanda noua, actualizeaza stocul produsului si genereaza factura aferenta cu numele reale.
